reference: Hello! I think I am pregnant. The pregnancy test showed two lines. After a week or so since the day I was expecting my period, my back started hurting when I move. I want to know if this is normal during pregnancy and what the reason might be for it to hurt. I also have symptoms – I have headaches, sometimes fever. I easily get emotional. My breasts have become extremely sensitive, and I feel pain. However, I do not have nausea. I think I am in the fifth week now, and I read somewhere that nausea is supposed to be the first sign too. Is this true?
text: Hello. I think I am pregnant. The pregnancy test showed two lines. After a week or so since the day I was expecting my period, my back started hurting once more. I want to know if this is normal during pregnancy and what the reason might be for it to hurt. I also have symptoms. I have headaches, sometimes fever. I easily get emotional. My breasts have become extremely sensitive and I feel pain. However, I do not have nausea. I think I am in the fifth week now and I read somewhere that nausea is supposed to be the first sign too. Is this true?
